{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201224065F9FEF3D104068B4D788"}"},"total":1083},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7304568121321554739","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"传统玄幻，脑洞有了，模式和套路也有，女主强势哦，对各个人物描写到位，特别是学院长老，感觉个个都有故事，这边看着看着男主女主是有感情戏的哦，还有和学院的三人组，女主是要从强变弱，男主从弱变强，前期我保护你，后期就变换了，这种模式很好，一心一意的，文笔和构思可以，静等更新……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700728232,"group_id":"7296846254569425970","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3kC8UygDbpiwscCVPhZA0QDiM4KibA3k83AsMRcbotg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/82164d99b2df403eb6b11fd37393de4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531912&x-signature=ZD7PJarr8FJ%2FzX%2FwD7AGMHgrcWM%3D","user_id":"3558455956481038","user_name":"俺是大老黑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3558455956481038","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《寻仙启示录》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296846254569425970","book_info":{"abstract":"传玄言情+剑道＋仙侠＋爱情＋诸天＋单女主＋无后宫＋无低能＋不无脑＋搞笑＋脑洞
三万年前元宇宙爆发诛仙大战，仙庭崩、天道损、灵气散，整个元宇宙四分五裂，分为诸天、圣、魔、灵……各域，更是诞生了无数禁区、绝地，亦有许多黑暗和小世界隐藏在宇宙各处，更产生了即为限制也为保护域外牢笼……
三万年后，一束流光划破无尽的黑暗星空降落到一片名为九州的大陆，流光中有一名婴儿——左丘辰。
因星空风暴和某种原因导致左丘辰先天失灵且体质羸弱，族中老者断言其无望过二十……
也许天意、也许左丘辰命中不该早逝，左丘辰在成人礼的前夜遇见了一个被追杀的圣境女子——慕容仙，改变了其人生轨道。
为寻求治疗先天失灵，左丘辰选择前往北境圣地，这时，自天道宫夫子登上道山，一句天道已死，青天当立，一统九州，唯我青圣的口号传遍各州，各方势力的争斗、天渊魔族的挑衅，九州大陆瞬间暗潮涌动了起来……
左丘辰一路经历生死磨炼，再遇慕容仙，回到北宣学院慕容仙解决了左丘辰的先天失灵，从此命运的齿轮开始转动…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8d78474fa5312602c3f7195f5b56f0c7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"就爱吃火锅","author_id":"","book_id":"7296846254569425970","book_name":"一剑，开仙门","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7296847132022506011","read_count":"15159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3991923"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1832","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,诸天万界,单女主,架空,东方玄幻,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7db520f8f8bacaeafe8bc07f91cb4d61~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164646&x-signature=vyvvPSFjbeDcIUiKHwu91C%2BuS1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2669205580943613", 左丘辰一路经历生死磨炼，再遇慕容仙，回到北宣学院慕容仙解决了左丘辰的先天失灵，从此命运的齿轮开始转动…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8d78474fa5312602c3f7195f5b56f0c7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"就爱吃火锅","author_id":"","book_id":"7296846254569425970","book_name":"一剑，开仙门","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7296847132022506011","read_count":"15159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3991923"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1832","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,诸天万界,单女主,架空,东方玄幻,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7db520f8f8bacaeafe8bc07f91cb4d61~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164646&x-signature=vyvvPSFjbeDcIUiKHwu91C%2BuS1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2669205580943613","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120414"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201224065F9FEF3D104068B4D788"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":26644,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26764,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6384},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1702007469,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7305209776954508070","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"想象力瑰丽迷人，令人大开眼界，特别是绝大多数小说都是连载更新的，情节跌宕起伏，引人入胜，让人每天追逐，沉迷于其中，欲罢不能，给了大量无聊人士以消遣时间，经过一系列艰苦卓绝的奋斗和曲折离奇的经历，最后功成名就，所谓“醉卧美人膝，醒掌天下权”，具有强烈的代入感和吸引力，作为玄幻修仙题材来说，的确是好文，作者开篇就把人物背景，事件转折，过程相遇，地方势力这些都娓娓道来，一定程度上是下足了功课的，每一步都有伏笔，还引用了经典的话语，如“天道已死，青天当立”这些，无论是叙事还是言情打斗格局，都彰显了作者的文学水品，看完了前面所有，给我的感觉是这是一部长篇，气势如虹的玄幻佳作，只是目前前期铺垫，但又不觉得拖拉，这点做得很好，期待后续，也将会一直关注，完了","text_exts":[{"e":139,"s":135,"text":"玄幻修仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398064668B4D788%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227305209776954508070%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227296846254569425970%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%84%E5%B9%BB%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700877788,"group_id":"7296846254569425970","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4OIdddMfIoP7oajus7BS6c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f95d92ecd0d643f4b676da0
